species: Inherited genetic variations in the melanocortin-1 receptor (MC1R) responsible for human red hair color
tissue: AMPK activation and MC1R palmitoylation repressed UVB-induced transformation of human melanocytes in vitro
cell_type: AMPK activation and MC1R palmitoylation repressed UVB-induced transformation of human melanocytes in vitro
